title: Verify submitting feedback from the post-cancellation pop-up
description: Test that a user can select a reason and submit the feedback form.
preconditions: The post-cancellation feedback pop-up is displayed

steps.description: 1. Select one of the cancellation reasons from the list.

expected_result: The feedback is submitted, the pop-up closes, and the 'feedback-submitted' event is fired with the selected option.
